description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mono:latest Docker image. Define a pages job (default stage) that runs only on the master branch, executes apt-get update, apt-get install wget -y, apt-get install unzip -y, downloads docfx v2.22.2 with wget, unzips it, and runs mono docfx/docfx.exe -o public, then publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. No services, caches, or extra variables are needed.
